title: Baroque Works Moves in Secret
description: On pages 14–18, this part focuses on baroque works moves in secret, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Moves in Secret. The Straw Hats struggle across Alabasta’s harsh desert as Vivi’s urgency and the scale of the rebellion become clearer. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hurry up, you guys! If you guys keep lagging behind, you might not survive the desert, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oh, you're still just as lovely when you're being cruel, OVam!!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Oh, for the love of...! What is it this time?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Crap, maybe it's because of that...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I tried to stop him but Luffy ate some weird cactus around here along with the lizard meat.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh no! This is the MESCAL CACTUS! Hal- Lucinogens are made from it!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Alright guys! Let's combine our strength, and blow it away!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh crap! That dumb camel's already all the way over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: C'mon! We've got to catch up to them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What's with the sudden drop in temperature?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's normal. It can reach sub-zero temperatures in the desert at nighttime.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Over there! I think I can see something!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are we finally here at Yuba!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I can't see with all this sand blowing in my face...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...some- thing is not right with the town!

summary: This part develops baroque works moves in secret and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
